case_title: CARMELO RAMIREZ-TORRES VS. MARIA R. LEON et al

MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-05-2010 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-26-2011 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE DEC-17-2010 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT LEON, MARIA R.
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR FEB-28-2011. JAN-26-2011 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF RAMIREZ-TORRES, CARMELO AS TO DEFENDANT LEON, MARIA R.
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE MAR-10-2011.
PLAINTIFF(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR WILLIAM FLETCHER CAMPBELL.
ARBITRATOR PETER L VESTAL APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION MAR-11-2011 THROUGH JUN-09-2011.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-05-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
AWARD FILED BY ARBITRATOR
ARBITRATOR'S FEE STATEMENT SENT TO ACCOUNTING FOR VESTAL, PETER L

REMOVED FROM ARBITRATION. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON AUG-19-2011 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. FOR JUDGMENT, DISMISSAL OR TRIAL DE NOVO. IF FILED, APPEARANCES WAIVED JUL-05-2011 ARBITRATION OSC IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PURSUANT TO CRC 3.827 (A), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RAMIREZ-TORRES, CARMELO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEON, MARIA R. $6,500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,500.00, AND PRE-JUDGMENT INTEREST IN THE AMOUNT OF $582.35 (CALCULATED THROUGH MAY 18, 2011). EACH PARTY SHALL BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS OF SUIT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-19-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
